OSINTdefender A U.S. Air Force KC-135R Stratotanker bearing the markings of the Ohio Air National Guard’s 121st Air Refueling Wing, was seen taxiing Monday at RAF Mildenhall in Suffolk, England, after arriving at the base from the Middle East, covered in dozen of temporary repair patches from apparent shrapnel damage, likely as a result of last month’s Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack on Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. Video credit: Mark Lynham via Facebook tweet

Michael A. Horowitz Pakistan is working to bring Iran and the United States back together for a second round of talks and to secure an extended ceasefire to allow for diplomacy, a senior Pakistani source tells AFP. tweet

⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul said direct talks between Israel and Lebanon can be an important first step towards respecting both Israel’s legitimate security interests and Lebanon’s territorial integrity. He called for Hezbollah’s attacks on Israel to stop and supported Lebanon’s monopoly on force and Hezbollah’s disarmament. He added that the Israeli army must protect civilians and civilian infrastructure. Germany provided an additional €45 million in humanitarian aid to Lebanon in March. @wfwitness

Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗ 🇸🇮 Slovenia is discussing a possible exit from NATO: ▪️ The country’s new parliamentary speaker, Zoran Stevanović, said he plans to organize a referendum on leaving the alliance. ▪️ He argued that Slovenia should pursue an independent policy and avoid involvement in external conflicts. ▪️ Stevanović also noted plans to visit Moscow, stating his position is not “pro-Russian” but focused on protecting Slovenia’s interests. ▪️ No final decision on holding the referendum has been made, and any actual withdrawal from NATO would be a lengthy process. ▪️ Earlier, Donald Trump also did not rule out the possibility of the United States leaving NATO. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

⚡️ 🇦🇺 AFP : Australia says it will boost spending on drones by up to A$5 billion as part of a broader push to adapt to changes in modern warfare. Defense Minister Richard Marles said the move is driven by lessons from conflicts in the Middle East and Ukraine, where large numbers of low cost drones and counter drone systems have become central to combat, with Australia planning to invest up to A$15 billion in autonomous capabilities over the next decade. @wfwitness

🇨🇳 🇮🇷 The Chinese tanker Rich Starry, subject to US sanctions, passed through the Strait of Hormuz despite the blockade imposed by Donald Trump the day before, CNN reports According to MarineTraffic data, the ship with a Malawian flag first attempted to cross the strait on April 13 but was forced to turn back. A new attempt was made in the evening, and by early Tuesday morning, the route was successfully completed. In addition, on Monday, another oil tanker, Elpis, flying the flag of the Comoros Islands, passed through the strait after the blockade came into effect. The vessel was under US sanctions in 2025 for transporting Iranian oil "as part of Iran's shadow fleet". 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Nidaa Al-Watan: The trilateral meeting of Israeli, Lebanese and U.S. ambassadors in Washington represents a decisive stage in setting the framework for direct negotiations. Lebanon insists on a ceasefire, even temporary, before any talks, calling it essential for a balanced process. Israel, however, pushes for negotiations focused on Hezbollah’s disarmament while maintaining military pressure – effectively negotiating under fire. A Lebanese presidential source rejected Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem’s call to cancel the meeting, stating that Lebanon is trying to stop the bloodshed and repair the mistake of others (Hezbollah) who launched the war. Lebanon is not making concessions but defending its sovereignty. A Lebanese government source said the U.S. has committed to pressuring Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu to agree to a ceasefire in southern Lebanon. The meeting’s success hinges on securing such a ceasefire, which would then allow broader talks. @wfwitness

🇷🇺 An SBU agent who was transmitting data about the objects of the Black Sea Fleet has been detained in Crimea The FSB also detained three participants in the preparation of a terrorist attack against a high-ranking security official in Moscow 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A Chinese tanker sanctioned by the United States passed through the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday despite a U.S. blockade on the chokepoint, shipping data showed. The Rich Starry would be the first to make it through the strait and to exit the Persian Gulf since the blockade began, data from LSEG, Marine Traffic and Kpler showed.

North Korea test-fired five missiles from its new 5,000-ton Choe Hyon-class destroyer off the west coast. The launch included 2 strategic cruise missile and 3 anti-ship missiles. State media said all missiles hit their targets with “ultra-precision.”

The U.S. and Indonesia launched a new “Major Defense Cooperation Partnership” (MDCP) to deepen military ties in the Indo-Pacific. It focuses on: Military modernization (tech, maritime systems, MRO support). Training & education (including special forces programs). Expanded joint exercises & interoperability. Separately, the two countries are in early discussions about possible U.S. military overflight access in Indonesian airspace.

The Red Cross condemned the incident, stating that the ambulance and its crew were clearly marked…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Colleagues of the Lebanese Red Cross paramedic Hassan Badawi in the Tebnine Center lit candles in his memory following the Israel attack that targeted him. @wfwitness

A U.S.-sanctioned Chinese tanker passed through the Strait of Hormuz despite the U.S. blockade, according to shipping data. The vessel, Rich Starry, carrying about 250,000 barrels of methanol, is the first known tanker to exit the Gulf since the blockade began.

The defense pact between Pakistan and Saudi Arabia appears uneven. Pakistan is explicitly obligated to send military forces to defend Saudi Arabia if requested, with clear language outlining that responsibility. By contrast, there is no equally clear clause requiring Saudi Arabia to defend Pakistan in return. Source: Drop Site News

Iran says initial estimates put war losses at $270 billion. The figure is not final.
Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: I firmly believe it is in the interest of both Spain and Europe to strengthen ties with China.
Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: Relations between China and Spain are in very good shape... We have established a strategic dialogue.

Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: We are living through times of change; the international order that once prevailed is being undermined by significant actors. There are those who choose to deny reality. We prefer to focus our efforts on reforming this international order.

Saudi Arabia is pushing the U.S. to end its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and resume talks, fearing escalation with Iran. Officials warn Iran could retaliate by disrupting the Bab al-Mandeb, a key route for oil exports. Source: WSJ
Marco Rubio will host Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington on Tuesday to begin direct negotiations. Source: Axios
